Download TableTop Nexus 1.0.2

Public installers are hosted on GitHub Releases. The website reads a generated stable release manifest so the version, checksums, and download buttons stay aligned with the shipped build.

Stable channel only Hosted on GitHub SHA256 checksums Released 2026-04-07

Release details

The release manifest is the single source of truth for version, release date, minimum OS support, and download URLs used by the public website.

Version 1.0.2
Channel stable
Release date 2026-04-07
Minimum OS Windows: Windows 10
macOS: macOS 12
Linux: Ubuntu 22.04 / equivalent

Stable installers are published through GitHub Releases and mirrored on the TableTop Nexus website through a generated manifest.

Verify the published SHA256 checksum before installing if you want to confirm file integrity.

Open GitHub release Open repository
TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.
